response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, polyglot full-stack engineer with roughly 20 years of hands-on development experience and some recent involvement in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows at re:cinq). However, the Principal Engineer — AI Strategy role is a director-level individual contributor position requiring recognized, deep AI expertise, a demonstrated portfolio of AI products or platforms built at scale, and the ability to advise strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption. Bogdan's AI exposure is nascent and confined to his current role; he holds no advanced AI credentials, shows no evidence of strategic customer advisory or thought leadership at the required level, and his career profile is that of a skilled hands-on engineer rather than an AI strategist or engineering executive.
strengths: Long, breadth-first engineering career spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure with genuine polyglot fluency
Founder experience with GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and the ability to build and ship independently
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows shows emerging relevance to the AI space
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — limited to the current role — with no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale and no advanced AI credentials (no Master's or PhD)
No evidence of director-level strategic leadership, executive stakeholder influence, or customer-facing advisory experience required by this role
Cloud platform expertise is absent; the role requires cloud architecture strategy and advising partners on large-scale cloud and AI adoption, which is outside Bogdan's documented experience

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and track record
Absence of director-level leadership and strategic advisory experience
Entrepreneurial initiative and hands-on builder credibility
